reasons.label: Too far
reasons.description: The service location is outside my travel range.

reasons.label: No available time
reasons.description: I don't have open slots that fit this request.

reasons.label: Outside my specialty
reasons.description: This request doesn't match the services I provide.

reasons.label: Schedule conflict
reasons.description: I already have a job booked at that time.

reasons.label: Not accepting jobs
reasons.description: I'm temporarily paused from taking new jobs.
